data.title: Binance will adjust the margin rates of 10 assets including ZEC
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of 10 assets under the portfolio margin model at 6:00 (UTC) on April 25, 2025. Among them, the collateral ratio of ZEC and TWT will be reduced from 70% to 60%, ZIL, ONE, ROSE, C98 will be reduced to 55%, ANKR, SKL, COTI will be reduced to 50%, and 1INCH will be reduced from 65% to 45%. The unified maintenance margin rate (uniMMR) may be affected during the adjustment period, and users need to pay attention to liquidation risks. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: A whale transferred 7488 ETH, worth about 11.92 million US dollars, and the wallet still holds 10,322 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale transferred 7,488 ETH (about 11.92 million US dollars) to the FalconX account after being silent for 1.8 years. The wallet currently still holds 10,322 ETH, worth about 16.48 million US dollars.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,600 USDT with a 1.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 19, 2025, 03:36 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,600.069946 USDT, with a narrowed 1.19% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: LBank will soon list Balance (EPT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Balance (EPT) at 20:00 (SGT) on April 21, and open EPT/USDT trading pairs. The deposit service will be opened at 20:00 on April 19, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 20:00 on April 22.

data.title: SKYAI pre-sale has raised about 50 million US dollars, and will hold an AMA at 8 pm today
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the BSC data infrastructure project SKYAI has ended its pre-sale, attracting more than 110,000 addresses to participate, and raising a total of 83,848 BNB (about 50 million US dollars). SKYAI will hold an AMA at 20:00 (UTC+8) on April 19 to announce follow-up plans. Guests participating in this AMA include crypto KOL BroLeon, Four.Meme and BNB Chain officials. SKYAI aims to serve the large language model (LLM) application scenario by connecting blockchain data through the expansion of MCP (Model Context Protocol). It now supports aggregated data sets from BSC and Solana, with a data volume of more than 10 billion rows, and will be expanded to ETH and BASE chains in the future. Its innovative new concept of "data liquidity" aims to build an open on-chain data economy ecosystem.

data.title: A diamond dealer was hit hard by the LUCE crash, from a profit of $5.2 million to a loss of $335,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, an investor bought 19.14 million LUCE at $0.0275 six months ago and has held it until now, earning more than $5.2 million in unrealized profits at the highest point. However, the price of LUCE has now plummeted by more than 70%, causing the investor to suffer a significant loss of $335,000.

data.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad author reiterates impending financial disaster, recommends buying gold, silver and Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Robert Kiyosaki, author of Rich Dad Poor Dad, reiterated in an article on the X platform the warnings he has repeatedly mentioned in books such as Illusion, Who Stole My Pension, and Rich Dad Poor Dad, pointing out the coming financial disaster. He emphasized that those who take action and invest in gold, silver or Bitcoin will likely become wealthy after the coming economic collapse. He firmly believes that by 2035, Bitcoin will reach $1 million, and gold and silver will also appreciate significantly.

data.title: US spot ETPs purchased more than 529,000 Bitcoins, far exceeding the number of newly mined Bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Since the launch of the US spot ETP, 529,325 bitcoins have been purchased, while only 249,725 new bitcoins have been mined during the same period. This shows that institutional demand for Bitcoin far exceeds the current supply, and the market demand for Bitcoin remains strong. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin Stalls at $84K, But Analyst Says 2025 Could Mirror Last Year’s Breakout
data.description:
Despite broader market interest, Bitcoin continues to hover near the $84,000 mark, showing limited upward momentum. At the time of writing, the asset is trading at $84,596, down 0. 1% in the last 24 hours. This places BTC approximately 22% below its all-time high of over $109,000 set earlier this year
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-stalls-at-84k-but-analyst-says-2025-could-mirror-last-years-breakout/
